response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep hands-on coding skills across multiple languages (including Python, JavaScript, D, C++), and a proven track record in building scalable systems and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of leading experimentation platforms, AI-driven growth systems, or cross-team instrumentation frameworks at enterprise scale — key requirements for this Principal role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience with distributed systems, telemetry, and high-throughput services (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby).
Proven ability to build and ship foundational tools (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, trial) with cross-team adoption potential.
Strong technical leadership demonstrated through mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions.
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or owning experimentation frameworks, feature flagging systems, or growth measurement platforms.
Limited visibility into AI tooling usage to accelerate engineering velocity, a preferred qualification.
Experience with metrics and telemetry is implied but not explicitly tied to experimentation quality, bias detection, or risk controls.
